data.title: PMGC Holdings Inc. Announces the Formation of New Subsidiary, NorthStrive Defense Tech to Target High-Growth Defense, Drone and Autonomous Systems Sector
data.description: PMGC Holdings Inc. has recently revealed the establishment of a new subsidiary, named NorthStrive Defense Tech. This initiative is aimed at capitalizing on the fast-growing market of defense, drone, and autonomous systems. The subsidiary will focus on tapping into this sector which is experiencing significant expansion. This strategic move indicates PMGC Holdings Inc.'s interest in bolstering its presence in these lucrative industries.

data.title: Olin Corporation First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call Announcement
data.description: Clayton, Missouri - Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) disclosed plans for a senior management review of the company's financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The review is scheduled for Friday, May 8, 2026, starting at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. The event will feature prepared remarks by Olin's senior management team.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics Announces Closing of $2.0 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HOTH), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in creating novel treatments for unmet medical issues, disclosed the completion of its registered direct offering. The offering involved a significant amount of capital raised for the company's ongoing research and development efforts.

data.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Named One of the Most Trustworthy Companies in America by Newsweek for Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange with the ticker symbol ARE, based in Pasadena, California, revealed plans to continue its leadership in owning, operating, and developing Megacampus™ ecosystems in prime life science innovation clusters. The company is known for its groundbreaking work in this field and is recognized as a pioneer.

data.title: Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. Adds Two New Independent Directors
data.description: Frances Allen and Felicia Thornton have joined the board bringing their extensive retail leadership and operational skills. Allen and Thornton will contribute their experience to the company's strategic direction. Their appointment signifies a valuable addition to the board with their combined years of expertise in the retail sector. The inclusion of Allen and Thornton highlights a significant enhancement in the board's composition and is expected to bring fresh perspectives to the company's decision-making processes. This development underlines the company's commitment to strengthening its leadership team with the addition of individuals possessing a wealth of knowledge in the retail industry. Allen and Thornton's presence is anticipated to have a positive impact on the company's future endeavors, given their proven track record in retail management.

data.title: Akebia Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on April 2, 2026, Akebia Therapeutics ®, Inc. (Nasdaq: AKBA), a biopharmaceutical company focused on improving the lives of those with kidney disease, provided 13 new employees with the opportunity to buy a total of 679,900 shares of Akebia’s common stock on March 31, 2026. These options were offered as a significant incentive for each new employee as they joined Akebia. This allocation of options adhered to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: HMH Holding Inc. Announces Closing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 2, 2026, HMH Holding Inc. revealed the completion of its initial public offering, where they sold 10,520,000 shares of Class A common stock at $20.00 per share. Additionally, the underwriters have the option to buy up to 1,578,000 more shares at the same price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions. The trading of Class A common stock commenced on April 1, 2026, on The Nasdaq Global Select Market using the ticker symbol “HMH.” HMH raised around $193.8 million in net proceeds from the offering, after subduing underwriting discounts and commissions alongside estimated offering expenses, not factoring in any further share purchases through the underwriters' option.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig Adds Shareholder Beverly Oliver to Health Care & FDA Practice in Dallas Office
data.description: On April 2, 2026, the international law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP announced the enhancement of its Health Care & FDA Practice in Dallas by welcoming Beverly Oliver as a new shareholder. Oliver, who previously held the position of chief legal officer at SightGrowth Partners, brings her expertise to the firm's Dallas office. This addition signifies a strategic move to bolster their team and provide specialized legal services in the health care sector.

data.title: Esperion Therapeutics Closes Acquisition of Corstasis Therapeutics, Expanding Its Cardiovascular Franchise with Enbumyst™ (bumetanide nasal spray)
data.description: Esperion has integrated Enbumyst, the initial and sole FDA-approved nasal spray loop diuretic, into its cardiovascular product lineup. This addition is expected to broaden the portfolio, enhance commercial opportunities, and bolster revenue growth.

data.title: Nilörngruppen publishes the Annual Report incl. the Sustainability Report for 2025
data.description: Today, Nilörngruppen AB released its Annual Report, along with the 2025 Sustainability Report, on its official website, www.nilorn.com. Notably, this marks the first time that the Sustainability Report complies with the EU’s Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) and the European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS).

data.title: CN Reports March Grain Movement
data.description: In Montreal, on April 2, 2026, leading transportation company CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) revealed a significant milestone by transporting over 2.96 million metric tonnes of grain from Western Canada during March. This achievement establishes a new record for the company for the month of March, further bolstered by the highest first-quarter results ever recorded in grain movement. Notably, weekly volumes surpassed 600,000 tonnes for two straight weeks, hitting a peak beyond 650,000 tonnes. This exceptional performance is attributed to the strong network capabilities and the increased demand observed across the West Coast and eastern corridors.

data.title: FibroBiologics Announces Closing of $3 Million Public Offering
data.description: Today, FibroBiologics, Inc. (NASDAQ: FBLG), a biotechnology company, completed a public offering of 2,272,728 shares of common stock and warrants to purchase an equal number of shares at a price of $1.32 per share. The company, known for focusing on developing therapies and potential cures for chronic diseases using fibroblasts and fibroblast-derived materials, holds over 270 patents. The warrants have an exercise price of $1.32 per share and can be exercised upon stockholder approval, with an expiration date set for five years from the approval date.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc., a prominent central nervous system precision neuroscience biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol PRAX, made an announcement on April 2, 2026. The Compensation Committee of Praxis’ Board of Directors approved the granting of restricted stock unit awards. These awards encompass a total of 3,558 shares of the company's common stock and were given to eighteen new non-executive employees. The awards were provided under the Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. 2024 Inducement Plan. This gesture was in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and was deemed crucial in attracting these employees to join Praxis.

data.title: Notice: Pending settlement of stockholder derivative actions requires immediate attention. Stay informed.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in unemployment figures in the country. The latest statistics reveal that the unemployment rate has risen to 7.5%, marking an increase of 2% from the previous quarter. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 1.5 million, indicating a worrisome trend in the job market. Additionally, the youth unemployment rate has surged to 15%, with a notable increase in the number of young people finding themselves out of work. This spike in unemployment is a cause for concern for policymakers and analysts, who are closely monitoring the situation to assess its wider implications on the economy. Efforts are being made to address this issue and create more job opportunities to reduce the unemployment rate and stabilize the labor market.

data.title: Evogene Reports Receipt of Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Notification
data.description: Evogene Ltd., a leading company in computational chemistry, specializing in designing small molecules for pharmaceutical and agricultural industries, announced their latest report on April 2, 2026. The company, listed on NASDAQ under EVGN and TASE under the same symbol, highlighted their innovative work in generative design.
